'''rajaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadlighter|leadlighter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadlighter|leadlighter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rajaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjæzæth|ræjæzæth]] || [[word:ræjæzæj|ræjæzæj]] || [[word:ræjæzæsh|ræjæzæsh]] || [[word:ræjæzæ|ræjæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajajazath|rajajazath]] || [[word:rajajazaj|rajajazaj]] || [[word:rajajazash|rajajazash]] || [[word:rajajaza|rajajaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajazath|rajazath]] || [[word:rajazaj|rajazaj]] || [[word:rajazash|rajazash]] || [[word:rajaza|rajaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajafzath|rajafzath]] || [[word:rajafzaj|rajafzaj]] || [[word:rajafzash|rajafzash]] || [[word:rajafzaf|rajafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajazatha|rajazatha]] || [[word:rajazaja|rajazaja]] || [[word:rajazasha|rajazasha]] || [[word:rajazaka|rajazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajazath|rajazath]] || [[word:rajazaj|rajazaj]] || [[word:rajazash|rajazash]] || [[word:rajaza|rajaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajazathal|rajazathal]] || [[word:rajazajal|rajazajal]] || [[word:rajazashal|rajazashal]] || [[word:rajazakal|rajazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajazathatha|rajazathatha]] || [[word:rajazajaja|rajazajaja]] || [[word:rajazashasha|rajazashasha]] || [[word:rajazaka|rajazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajazathan|rajazathan]] || [[word:rajazajan|rajazajan]] || [[word:rajazashan|rajazashan]] || [[word:rajazakan|rajazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajazathaoro|rajazathaoro]] || [[word:rajazajaoro|rajazajaoro]] || [[word:rajazashaoro|rajazashaoro]] || [[word:rajazakaoro|rajazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
